problem: Lifecycle truth split between old memory-phase system and new Work Order/Lane model. New model is ~92% complete but transitional seams remain: no phase auto-advance, review/ship manual where they should be automatic, memory observations not deeply used in context composition.
globalDecisions: Work Order + Lane + Delivery Run is the canonical lifecycle source of truth
Old phase becomes a derived compatibility view, auto-synced from work order status
Profile automation hooks (autoReview, autoShip, autoPlan) drive automatic transitions
Patrol owns recovery, retry, and escalation for stuck lifecycle stages
openQuestions: Should phase auto-advance be a side-effect of work_order_sync or a separate patrol job?
How deeply should observation confidence levels gate contradiction detection?

candidateFeatures.userOutcome: Phase truth is always consistent with work order status. No manual phase-set needed. Patrol detects and remediates phase divergence.
candidateFeatures.scopeSummary: Add phase auto-advance as side-effect of work_order_sync. Add patrol consistency check for phase/status divergence. Deprecate manual phase-set in lifecycle commands.
risks: Backward phase transition warnings may fire during auto-sync if work order regresses
Commands that gate on phase may need updated to read work order status instead
candidateFeatures.readinessReason: Scope is clear, all dependencies are met, no open questions blocking implementation
candidateFeatures.handoffSummary: Wire set_feature_phase() into sync_work_order() using _phase_from_status(). Add patrol check that warns on phase/status divergence. Update /review and /ship commands to read work order status as primary truth, phase as fallback.

candidateFeatures.userOutcome: When profile allows, review starts automatically after review-readiness, and ship starts automatically after review passes. Manual gates preserved for profiles that require them.
candidateFeatures.scopeSummary: Add auto-review and auto-ship paths to dispatcher tick. Auto-review: invoke write_review() + auto-complete stages from automated verdict when profile_auto_review=true. Auto-ship: invoke start_ship + build_ship_draft when profile_auto_ship=true and review passes. Surface profile requirements in work order automation state. Post-ship cleanup as best-effort patrol task.
risks: Auto-review skips human judgment — mitigated by profile gating (only high-autonomy profiles opt in)
Auto-ship git operations (stage/commit/push) require branch safety checks
candidateFeatures.readinessReason: All building blocks exist: profile hooks implemented, write_review() generates automated verdict, ship_draft.py generates full draft, state machines handle transitions. Only wiring needed.
candidateFeatures.handoffSummary: In dispatcher tick: after auto-plan, check lanes in implementing/reviewing/shipping status. For implementing lanes with review_readiness=ready and profile_auto_review=true: call write_review(), auto-complete stages, set verdict. For lanes with ship.status=ready and profile_auto_ship=true: call start_ship(), build_ship_draft(), stage results. Surface profile policy in work_order automation state. Post-ship cleanup as patrol finding.

candidateFeatures.userOutcome: prime() produces rich, feature-aware context summaries that include active observations, resolved contradictions, and lane status. Context is useful for implementation decisions, not just task tracking.
candidateFeatures.scopeSummary: Enhance prime() to compose context from work order state + observations + contradictions + cards. Add feature-specific context mode. Improve observation sourcing (link to artifact locations). Add observation confidence levels to contradiction gating.
risks: Richer context increases token consumption in prime() output
Observation confidence logic may be over-engineered for current scale
candidateFeatures.readinessReason: Independent of other features but lower priority. Observations already persisted; this is about using them better.
candidateFeatures.handoffSummary: Enhance context.py prime() to read cards table and format feature-aware summaries. Add --feature flag to prime CLI. Improve observation natural_key sourcing. Consider Honcho-inspired observation levels (explicit vs inferred) for confidence-weighted context.
